ab: Wa sapah ka Ayuc Watan hu?
en: A: May I ask if Ayuc Watan is home?

ab: Wa sapah ka hiya, awah cka sapah.
en: She’s at home, please come in.

ab: Wa sapah ka Sawa Watan hu?
en: A: Is Sawa Watan at home?

ab: Uka wah, niqan manu ka ddaun su?
ch: B:她不在，請問你有什麼事?
en: B: She’s not here, what can I do for you?

ab: Ima su ka isu hu?
en: B: Who are you?

ab: tama rudan, yaku Rabay Diro, rwahi ku rhngun.
en: A: Grandpa, I’m Rabay Diro, please open the door.

ab: Ima su ka isu?
en: B: Who is it?

ab: Lubi Nawi, Kumu Nawi ku ka yaku, wisu ku miyah tuhuy sunan da.
ch: B:Lubi Nawi，我是Kumu Nawi，我來找你玩了。
en: A: Lubi Nawi, I’m Kumu Nawi and I’ve come to play with you.

ab: Bsiyaq ta bay ini tqita da.
en: A: Long time no see.

ab: Kiya wah! Lnglungun misu balay! Nhari miyah pprngaw ta kari pa!
ch: B:是啊!我很想念你。快來聊天吧!
en: B:Yeah! I miss you so much. Come on, let’s chat!

ab: Tlung, mahi kal oyu.
en: B: Please sit down and have a cup of tea.

ab: Mhuway su balay.
en: A: Thank you.

ab: Mahi kal ocya.
en: B: Please have a cup of tea.

ab: Malu bay mmahun ka ocya namu.
en: A:Your tea is delicious.

ab: Uqi ta hiyi pnwalang pa!
en: B: Let’s eat fruit!

ab: Iyaq wa! So knmalu bay qtan ka hhiyi pnwalang ni.
ch: B:好喔!這些水果看起來很棒。
en: A: Yes! These fruits look great.

ab: Malu uqun ka hiyi pnwalang hu?
en: B: How is the fruit?

ab: Iyaq, balay bay malu uqun.
en: A:Yes, it’s really delicious.

ab: Mnhdu pchada equn idaw kman ka bubu da, nhari miyah mkan pa!
ch: A:媽媽煮好晚餐了，快來吃吧!
en: B: Mom has cooked dinner, come and eat!

ab: Iyaq, sani ku trima bawa.
en: A: Okay, I’ll go wash my hands.

ab: Ququ mkan mi mimah, mbay su sediq icil da.
ch: A:盡量吃喝，你又不是外人。
en: B: Try to eat and drink as much as possible, you’re not an outsider.

ab: Ou bay qnqan mu da, mtngi bay da.
en: A: I ate a lot, I’m full.

ab: Kou hari uqun su, iya qsiqa.
en: B: Eat more, don’t be polite.

ab: Iyaq, malu bay uqun.
en: A:Well, it’s delicious.

ab: Mmusa ku da, miyah ku mita sunan nxal dungan.
ch: A:我要離開了，下次再來看你。
en: A: I’m leaving, I’ll see you next time.

ab: Iyaq, swayay ta da.
en: B: Okay, goodbye.

ab: Kman bay da, musa ku sapah da.
en: A: It’s late, I’m going home.

ab: Awah tuhuy babaw dungan ha!
en: B:Come again next time!

ab: Knhuway musa.
en: B: Walk slowly and carefully.

ab: Iyaq, niqan diyax su pa awah tuhuy sapah mu.
en: A: Okay, come to my house sometime.
